name: GovernanceIndex
description: Live AI governance TRiSM and compliance risk scoring. Regulatory risk scores, audit readiness, and framework mapping across 30+ standards, updated daily.

distribution.name: GovernanceIndex Latest JSON
distribution.description: Full governance and compliance dataset in JSON format, updated daily

distribution.name: GovernanceIndex Latest CSV
distribution.description: Full governance and compliance dataset in CSV format, updated daily

prov:wasGeneratedBy.name: GovernanceIndex Data Collection
prov:wasGeneratedBy.description: Automated collection of regulatory framework data, compliance requirements, and risk scoring from official sources

prov:used.name: Regulatory Framework Documents
prov:used.description: Official regulatory texts and framework documentation from EU, NIST, ISO, and OWASP

prov:used.name: Compliance Assessment Data
prov:used.description: Cross-framework compliance mapping and risk scoring algorithms

knownLimitations: Regulatory frameworks evolve and scores may lag behind latest amendments
Compliance assessments are advisory and not legal determinations
Framework mapping involves interpretation that may differ from official guidance
Some regional regulations may have limited coverage

ethicsAndResponsibleUse.biasConsiderations: Coverage weighted toward major international frameworks. Regional or industry-specific regulations may be underrepresented.
ethicsAndResponsibleUse.intendedBeneficiaries: Compliance teams, legal counsel, auditors, researchers, AI systems needing governance and compliance data
